title: Unlocking Desire After 40
caption: Are you ready to reignite your passion?
layout: Cycle diagram showing the journey through self-discovery, body acceptance, emotional connection, and sexual exploration. Each stage features key points, such as the importance of self-love in self-discovery, and the role of communication in emotional connection.

title: The Midlife Intimacy Checklist
caption: How well do you nurture your relationships?
layout: Two-column compare format. One side lists essential intimacy practices (e.g. quality time, open communication) while the opposite side shows the results of neglecting these practices (e.g. disconnectedness, misunderstandings).

title: What’s Your Pleasure Style?
caption: Are you aware of how you like to feel pleasure?
layout: 2x2 grid representing four pleasure archetypes: Sensual, Playful, Deeply Emotional, and Adventurous. Each section contains descriptions, activities, and examples to embody each style.

title: The Confidence Connection
caption: Do you feel confident in your skin?
layout: 4-stage progression laying out the stages of building confidence: Acceptance, Exploration, Expression, and Empowerment. Each stage includes practical tips and self-reflection questions.

title: Navigating Changes in Libido
caption: Are you curious about shifting sexual desires?
layout: Cycle diagram highlighting causes of libido changes (e.g. hormonal shifts, lifestyle changes) and solutions (e.g. communication, self-care) in interconnected loops.

title: Signs of a Thriving Relationship
caption: Is your relationship thriving or just surviving?
layout: Two-column compare. Left side lists key signs of a thriving relationship (e.g. shared laughter, trust) while the right shows signs of a struggling relationship (e.g. avoidance, resentment).

title: The Body Love Journey
caption: How connected are you to your body?
layout: 4-stage progression featuring: Awareness, Acceptance, Exploration, and Celebration, with each stage containing tips and reflections to deepen body love.

title: Emotional Clarity in Midlife
caption: Do your emotions feel tangled or clear?
layout: Cycle diagram to explore emotional clarity with stages: Awareness, Expression, Understanding, and Integration. Each stage defines emotional states and practical tools for clarity.

title: Why Communication is Key
caption: Are you truly hearing each other?
layout: Two-column compare showcasing healthy communication (e.g. active listening, validation) vs. unhealthy communication (e.g. interruption, blame) with examples and tips.

title: Rediscovering Playfulness
caption: When was the last time you enjoyed spontaneous fun?
layout: 2x2 grid showing different playful activities in each quadrant: Solo Play, Partner Play, Group Fun, and Creative Expression, with ideas and benefits for each.

title: The Importance of Self-Compassion
caption: Are you your own worst critic?
layout: Cycle diagram illustrating self-compassion’s stages: Acknowledgment, Kindness, Understanding, and Growth, complete with reflections and exercises for each stage.

title: Creating Safe Spaces in Relationships
caption: Do you feel safe sharing your true self?
layout: Two-column compare detailing characteristics of a safe space (e.g. non-judgment, trust) versus an unsafe space (e.g. criticism, hostility) along with tips to cultivate safety.

title: The Power of Vulnerability
caption: Are you brave enough to be vulnerable?
